chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.D-07 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A 1196 /18 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A 1197/18 4. For hearing. 12.02.2018. Altaf Hussain Chandio, Advocate for applicants alongwith applicants. 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2. Overruled. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Applicants/accused are present alongwith their Advocate who has been heard for grant of protective bail in their favour in Crime No.254/2017 registered under Section 431, 341, 427, 398, 504, 151, 152, 186, 189, 337-L(ii), 147 PPC, r/w Section 6/7 ATA at P.S Sakrand It is stated by the learned counsel for the applicants/accused that the case against applicants is false and has been registered due to enmity. He further submitted that the applicants / accused intend to appear/surrender before the concerned Court to face the trial but apprehend their illegal arrest at the hands of police, as the trial court has already issued warrants. Serious allegations of malafide have been alleged against police. Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case and in order to enable the applicants/accused to appear before the concerned court for pre-arrest bail, they are granted protective bail for a period of 10 days commencing from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case the applicants/accused failed to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited.

Without touching the merits and de-merits of the case and in order to enable the applicants/accused to appear before the concerned court for pre-arrest bail, they are granted protective bail for a period of 10 days commencing from today, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.25,000/- each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. In case the applicants/accused failed to appear before the concerned court within the stipulated period the surety amount shall be forfeited. This order shall cease to have effect after expiry of 10 days on 21.02.2018 or when the applicants surrender before the concerned court, whichever is earlier, till then operation of NBWs, if any, issued against the applicants/accused shall remain suspended. In view of the above, this bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE
